name: Stone Age World
description:
Travel back to the ancient times of the Neolithic era! Experience the struggles and delights that accompany the conclusion of the Stone Age. From tribal leaders to ordinary gatherers, everyone plays a distinct role. Choose your path and engage with life as either an active participant in your society or a lone individual, confronting the rugged and primal environment of the Stone Age. Immerse yourself in history and appreciate the pristine beauty of this early world.

╔═══════════════════════╗

For those who complain that the bot speaks on your behalf, I wrote in the bot that it should NOT speak on your behalf, so this is an error in your API. To fix this, it will be enough to edit the bot's message or delete the last few messages.

╚═══════════════════════╝
creator: Namulantas
